mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT IRS_NUM FROM STOCCUST WHERE GATE_CD = SITE.GATE_CD AND CUST_CD = SITE.COMPANY_CD) AS CORP_NO , SITE.DEPT_CD AS BRC ,(SYSDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') AS APLY_DT , TVUR.SITE_USER_ID AS USER_ID , 'SMS_PC_RJ' '@@' TVUR.GATE_CD '@@' TVUR.USER_ID AS CONT_TBL_PK , NULL AS FILE_SIZE FROM STOCTVUR TVUR JOIN STOCTVUR SITE ON (SITE.GATE_CD = TVUR.GATE_CD AND SITE.USER_ID = TVUR.SITE_USER_ID) WHERE TVUR.GATE_CD = #{ses.gateCd} AND TVUR.USER_ID = #{USER_ID} AND TVUR.SITE_USER_ID = #{ses.userId}
